title: Basic JavaScript Movie Search App

title: Intermediate JavaScript Movie Search App

title: Advanced JavaScript Movie Search App Project
description: Build a small application that applies TMDB API integration, Search with debouncing, Filtering and sorting in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Movie Search App
description: The following code has bugs related to TMDB API integration. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Movie Search App
